name: hdfstream

metadata.name: hdfstream
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: Python client for HDF5/messagepack streaming service.

documentation:
# Client module for HDF5 messagepack streaming service

This module provides facilities to access remote HDF5 files via streaming
in messagepack format. See the service documentation for details.

modules.name: hdfstream.remote_file
documentation: !/bin/env python

classes.name: hdfstream.remote_file.RemoteFile

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_file.RemoteFile.load
documentation: Request the msgpack representation of this file from the server

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_file.RemoteFile.unpack
documentation: Decode the msgpack representation of this group

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_file.RemoteFile.root
documentation: Open the HDF5 root group in this file, if we didn't already

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_file.RemoteFile.open
documentation:
Return a File-like object with the contents of the file

Reading returns bytes if mode='rb' or strings if mode='r'.
Object representing a file on the remote server

modules.name: hdfstream.exceptions
documentation: !/bin/env python

documentation: !/bin/env python

documentation: Request the msgpack representation of this directory from the server

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_directory.RemoteDirectory.unpack
documentation: Decode the msgpack representation of this directory
Object representing a virtual directory on the remote server

modules.name: hdfstream.remote_dataset
documentation: !/bin/env python

classes.name: hdfstream.remote_dataset.RemoteDataset

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_dataset.RemoteDataset._single_slice
documentation:
Fetch a slice of this dataset. May return fewer elements
than requested if result is too large for a msgpack bin
object.

start: array of starting offsets in each dimension
count: number of elements to fetch in each dimension

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_dataset.RemoteDataset.slice
documentation:
Repeatedly slice dataset until all requested elements
have been received.

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_dataset.RemoteDataset.__getitem__
documentation:
Fetch a dataset slice by indexing this object.

Translates a numpy style tuple of integer/slice/ellipsis objects into
the start and count parameters needed for the web API.
Object representing a HDF5 dataset in the remote file

modules.name: hdfstream
documentation: !/bin/env python

functions.name: hdfstream.open
documentation: Open a remote file or directory given a virtual path

modules.name: hdfstream.defaults
documentation: !/bin/env python
Default maximum recursion depth when loading nested groups in a single
request. Deeper groups are only loaded when requested.

documentation: !/bin/env python

functions.name: hdfstream.remote_group.unpack_object
documentation: Construct an appropriate class instance for a HDF5 object

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_group.RemoteGroup.load
documentation: Request the msgpack representation of this group from the server

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_group.RemoteGroup.unpack
documentation: Decode the msgpack representation of this group

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_group.RemoteGroup.ensure_member_loaded
documentation: Load sub-groups on access, if they were not already loaded

methods.name: hdfstream.remote_group.RemoteGroup.__getitem__
documentation:
Return a member object identified by its name or relative path.

If the key is a path with multiple components we use the first
component to identify a member object to pass the rest of the path to.
Object representing a HDF5 group in the remote file

modules.name: hdfstream.connection
documentation: !/bin/env python

functions.name: hdfstream.connection.decode_hook
documentation:
Converts dicts decoded from the msgpack stream into numpy ndarrays. Called
by msgpack.unpack().

Dicts with nd=True contain a binary buffer which should be wrapped with a
numpy array with type and shape given by the metadata in the dict. We call
msgpack-numpy's decode() function to do this.

Dicts with vlen=True contain flattened lists of variable size
elements and are translated into numpy object arrays.

functions.name: hdfstream.connection.raise_for_status
documentation:
Check the http response status and raise an exception if necessary

This also extracts the error message from the response body, if
there is one.

classes.name: hdfstream.connection.Connection

documentation: Make a request and unpack the response

documentation: Request the msgpack representation of a file or directory from the server

methods.name: hdfstream.connection.Connection.request_object
documentation: Request the msgpack representation of a HDF5 object from the server

methods.name: hdfstream.connection.Connection.request_slice

Request a dataset slice.  May return fewer elements
than requested if result is too large for a msgpack bin

methods.name: hdfstream.connection.Connection.open_file
documentation: Open the file at the specified virtual path
Class to store http session information and make requests
